name: GODAI TAIGEKI: SANDAN JUTSU (ELEMENTAL BEATDOWN: RANK THREE TECHNIQUE)

description.value:
Type: Ninjutsu (*)

Rank: 5 (Spell Level 3)

Chakra Cost: 4

Learn DC: 18 | Successes: 2

Perform: 6 | Perform DC: 18

Components: H, E *

This technique works like Godai Taigeki: Shodan Jutsu, except you launch an orb of elemental force, dealing 4d6 damage. This technique has the following variants:

- Denshindou no Jutsu (Raiton) [Electric]: Can be empowered up to 12d6.
- Dorodan no Jutsu (Doton) [Earth]: Can be empowered up to 10d6. Material Focus - At least 75 lbs of earth, stone or mud nearby.
- Gehidama no Jutsu (Katon) [Fire]: Can be empowered up to 12d6.
- Gufuudan no Jutsu (Fuuton) [Wind]: Can be empowered up to 12d6.
- Hyourindan no Jutsu (Hyouton) [Cold]: Can be empowered up to 10d6. Material Focus - At least 15 cubic ft of snow or ice nearby.
- Mizudan no Jutsu (Suiton) [Water]: Can be empowered up to 10d6. Material Focus - At least 75 litres of water nearby.

Empower: Spend 1 Chakra to increase the damage by 1d6, up to 1d6 per level or the maximum indicated per variant (whichever is lower).
